EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IStatsHistogram4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to accumulating member variables. Allows for block-wise outside updating.

[Guid("620B3F79-6B77-4273-8825-CF2B029431EB")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IStatsHistogram4 : IStatsHistogram3, IStatsHistogram2, IStatsHistogram

GetCovarAccu(int, out double, out double, out double, out double)

Get the accumulating or running variables used for covar computation. Continue to increment from here.

numValidPixel double

meanX double

Put the accumulating or running variables used for covar computation. Do this after having incremented them.
